content:
2️⃣ Weapons or Hand Tools – Each Archetype Grouping Gets Three Options
• Warriors: Sword, spear, or gauntlets.
• Tricksters: Dagger, deck of trick cards, or enchanted flute.
• Oracles: Wand, staff, or crystal orb.
• Wanderers: Compass, spyglass, or bow.
• Archivists: Quill, ledger, or book of forgotten texts.

3️⃣ Personal Starting Item – Unique to Each Player
• Chosen based on background or narrative choice.
• Examples: A key that unlocks an unknown door, a relic from a past event, a sealed letter.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Adds player-driven roleplaying elements.
✔ Helps students define their character’s identity in both gameplay and storytelling.
✔ Encourages deeper immersion in the game mechanics.

📜 3. Item Distribution & Caps – Balancing Scarcity & Power
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 503 (chunk 503/555)
